compiled_state.title: Run sync-eval-model-ids.sh on all 13 eval configs
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
Execute sync-eval-model-ids.sh to rewrite model IDs across ALL THREE TIERS (haiku, sonnet, opus) in all 13 promptfooconfig.yaml files. Verify no stale model IDs remain.

TDD Exemption: Unit exemption criterion 3 — modifies only static YAML data files. Sync script tested in Tasks 3/4.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] No stale model IDs remain for any tier
  Verify: HAIKU_ID=$(grep 'model.haiku=' .claude/dso-config.conf | cut -d= -f2) && SONNET_ID=$(grep 'model.sonnet=' .claude/dso-config.conf | cut -d= -f2) && OPUS_ID=$(grep 'model.opus=' .claude/dso-config.conf | cut -d= -f2) && STALE=$(grep -rn 'claude-\(haiku\|sonnet\|opus\)-[0-9]' plugins/dso/skills/*/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml plugins/dso/agents/*/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml evals/*/promptfooconfig.yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -v "$HAIKU_ID" | grep -v "$SONNET_ID" | grep -v "$OPUS_ID" | wc -l) && test "$STALE" -eq 0
- [ ] Config model IDs present in eval configs
  Verify: grep -q "$(grep model.haiku .claude/dso-config.conf | cut -d= -f2)" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
